emails.subject: 4/27 Checkout
emails.body: 4/27 Checkout BLOOMBERG Mark Fischer deal 595043 Should the cp be Williams because Bloomberg shows a deal identical to this however, the cp is Williams and we do not have a deal for Williams like this deal. PREBON WEST I am missing Mike Swerzbin: Buys Duke Q2'02 SP-15 at $102 peak hrs Tom Alons: buys Aquila May Palo Verde at $315 AMEREX WEST I am missing: MIke Swerzbin: 1) Enron buys BP 25mw June Palo at $415 2) Enron buys Duke 25 mw Q4'02 COB $105
